textPlain: Hi, Lewis here (one of the co-authors). Happy to answer any questions people have about the book :)

Hugging Face is not just an AI information-sharing website; it’s also a great learning platform for all AI learners. This documentation is one of the most impressive hands-on resources I’ve ever read.

I'm a little ways through this and it's great so far, nice job.One of the reasons people build one though is to learn. Most smart folks are quite aware that the reality of pre-training a real LLM is going to involve some head banging against the wall (ie, things don't go smoothly like "building an llm from scratch" book), and they want to go through the process.
What others would you recommend that are comparable in quality?
